_comment: Manual toggles the API can't detect. Safe to commit and share. Update when an event runs.

_help.gold_pass_boost_pct: 0 for none, else 10 / 15 / 20 to match your Gold Pass build-time boost tier.
_help.events: List of live event boosts. Each: {name, kind, scope, percent}. kind is 'time' or 'cost'. scope is 'all', or {category:'heroes'|'troops'|'spells'|'pets'|'equipment'|'defenses'|'walls'}, or {resource:'gold'|'elixir'|'dark_elixir'}. percent is the discount.
